title: Imaging and Quantification for ST
steps: Images scanned with Olympus VS200 (mode: projection intensity accumulation)​
Imagesare cropped for sections following the Bregma range (0.98mm – 0.74mm)
Channels are renamed based on their antibody(DAPI, TH, mCherry, αSyn)
Annotations are categorized in 4 quadrants foreach side of Striatum as DL, DM, VL, VM.
Quadrants are annotated surrounding TH+ cellsclusters and including the accumbens nucleus core landmark.
Two circular annotations of consistent size incortical region of each section are created for background intensity values.(Neg1 and Neg2)
Compute intensity feature was used with thefollowing parameters:

a. Channels: TH/mCherry/αSyn b. Preferred pixel size: 2µm c. Tile diameter for ROI: 25µm d. Area: X µm 2 (depending on the size of the annotation) e. Perimeter: X µm (depending on the size of the annotation) f. Mean intensity: 2.00 µm per pixel: (TH/ mCherry / αSyn)
‘Annotation measurement’ results of each image arethen exported to excel and arranged accordingly.
creator: Tony Hsiao
